_comment: VS Code MCP Configuration for ZombieCoder — Global Setup
_usage_http: Copy servers block to your VS Code settings.json under mcp.servers OR use .vscode/mcp.json (mcpServers format below). Requires running bridge: node dist/index.js (port 9999)
_usage_stdio: Spawns MCP server as child process (standalone, no bridge needed). Use when bridge is not running.

zombiecoder-http._description: Connect to running ZombieCoder Proxi Bridge (port 9999) — auto-discovers tools, RAG, identity, SSOT

zombiecoder-stdio._description: Spawn MCP server directly (standalone mode, no bridge needed)

zombiecoder-http._description: Connect to running ZombieCoder Proxi Bridge (port 9999)
